title: On-call Shift Handover Document — SRE Partners
scope_note: Completed by the outgoing on-call engineer at the end of each 12-hour shift; shared with the incoming engineer and the engineering manager.

sections.heading: Shift Summary
sections.content:
**Shift period**: ___ UTC to ___ UTC
**Outgoing engineer**: ___
**Incoming engineer**: ___

**Overall status**: [ ] Stable  [ ] Degraded  [ ] Active incident

**Incidents opened this shift**:

| Incident ID | Severity | Title | Status | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| INC-___ | P___ | ___ | Open / Resolved | ___ |

**Alerts fired** (non-incident): ___
**Deployments during shift**: ___

sections.heading: Open Items for Incoming Engineer
sections.content:
List every item requiring action or monitoring:

1. **Active incidents**: _(list each with current hypothesis and last update time)_
2. **Pending deployments**: _(list any deployments scheduled in the next 2 h)_
3. **Degraded services**: _(list any services not at 100% with current impact)_
4. **Monitoring anomalies to watch**: _(list any non-alerting metrics showing unusual trends)_
5. **Scheduled maintenance**: _(list any maintenance windows in the next 8 h)_

**Recommended first action for incoming engineer**: ___

sections.heading: Escalation Contacts Active This Shift
sections.content:
Contacts engaged or on standby:

| Team | Contact | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Platform / K8s | On-call via `svc-platform-oncall` | [ ] Engaged  [ ] Standby |
| Backend / API | On-call via `svc-backend-oncall` | [ ] Engaged  [ ] Standby |
| Security | On-call via `svc-security-oncall` | [ ] Engaged  [ ] Standby |
| Database / DBA | On-call via `svc-dba-oncall` | [ ] Engaged  [ ] Standby |

**Any severity escalations this shift** (P1 → P0 or P2 → P1): ___
**Engineering Manager aware**: [ ] Yes  [ ] No — notify before handover if any P0/P1 open

sections.heading: Post-Incident Follow-ups Due
sections.content:
PIRs and follow-up actions to track:

| Incident | PIR Due Date | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| INC-___ | ___ | ___ | [ ] Scheduled  [ ] Drafted  [ ] Published |

**Communication templates used this shift**: Record which templates were sent and to which channels so the incoming engineer can continue the cadence:

- [ ] Initial alert sent for INC-___ at ___ to `#oncall-___`
- [ ] Status updates sent at ___-minute intervals
- [ ] Resolution notice sent at ___ to `#oncall-___`

**Handover complete**: Outgoing engineer signature: ___ | Time: ___
